required_contains.text: The same floor appears in the constants reference as the startup constant
`api.consts.subtensorModule.initialMinBurn`, listed as `500000`, the raw form of the 0.0005 TAO
figure above. That value anchors the bottom of the dynamic registration band whose other startup
constants are `initialBurn`, listed as `100000000` (0.1 TAO, the starting burn), and
`initialMaxBurn`, listed as `100000000000` (100 TAO, the ceiling). Each names a launch value, while
the live `MinBurn`, `Burn`, and `MaxBurn` storage values are the owner-settable values a subnet uses
